offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month, manual submission causes delays that can result in project penalties. We automate digital submissions instead of manual submission of paper permits.
problem: Manual submission of construction permits leads to delays and potential fines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on permit workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for construction tools and resources
try_it: Let users try monthly scheduling for submissions and deadline notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Short demo video showcasing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing permit data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
